name: @forwardimpact/libhttp
description: HTTP service framework — ship a Hono service endpoint without reimplementing lifecycle, security headers, or health checks.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: Starting a new HTTP service and reaching for last service's copy-pasted Hono wiring.
jobs.bigHire: ship an HTTP endpoint without reimplementing server lifecycle, security headers, or health checks.
jobs.littleHire: mount routes on a configured app and call start().
jobs.competesWith: copy-pasting Hono setup; hand-rolling node:http servers; tolerating the duplication
